title: MongoDBAtlasNetworkPeeringProperties
description: Returns, adds, edits, and removes network peering containers and peering connections.. Source:- No source definition found, add manually please

ProjectId.description: Unique 24-hexadecimal digit string that identifies your project.

ContainerId.description: Unique 24-hexadecimal digit string that identifies the MongoDB Cloud network container that contains the specified network peering connection.

AccepterRegionName.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) region where the Virtual Peering Connection (VPC) that you peered with the MongoDB Cloud VPC resides. The resource returns null if your VPC and the MongoDB Cloud VPC reside in the same region.

AwsAccountId.description: Unique twelve-digit string that identifies the Amazon Web Services (AWS) account that owns the VPC that you peered with the MongoDB Cloud VPC.

RouteTableCIDRBlock.description: Internet Protocol (IP) addresses expressed in Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) notation of the VPC's subnet that you want to peer with the MongoDB Cloud VPC.

VpcId.description: Unique string that identifies the VPC on Amazon Web Services (AWS) that you want to peer with the MongoDB Cloud VPC.

Profile.description: The profile is defined in AWS Secret manager. See [Secret Manager Profile setup](../../../examples/profile-secret.yaml).
